dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.description: Knowledge base health: documents, indexing, and volume
dashboard.loadError: Failed to load analytics — check your connection and try again.

metrics.chunksSub: pieces of text in the index

factory.title: What the factory built
factory.themesSub: groups of similar documents, assembled automatically
factory.hypothesesSub: testable ideas with evidence and a score
factory.goalsSub: metrics that hypotheses are built around

empty.title: No documents yet
empty.description: Analytics will appear after the first documents are uploaded to the knowledge base.

users.title: Users and roles
users.description: Accounts with access to search, curation, and administration
users.loadError: Failed to load users — check your connection and try again.

dialog.title: New user
dialog.description: The account works right away — hand the login and password to the employee

settings.title: System settings
settings.description: Everything stored on the server lives here: platform parameters (AI model, internet publication search), ranking weights and the working thresholds of the hypothesis factory.

tabHints.model: Which model answers and generates hypotheses: Yandex, OpenRouter or your own server. The switch affects every user and applies within seconds, no restart.
tabHints.generation: Left — shared parameters: internet publication search and generation modes. Right — the working thresholds and limits of the hypothesis factory.
tabHints.ranking: Transparent-ranking weights: what the final hypothesis score is made of.

weights.title: Hypothesis ranking weights
weights.hintBody: A hypothesis's priority is a weighted blend of six factors. Increase the factors that matter to you — and the hypotheses re-sort. On save, the weights are normalized to sum to 100%.
weights.description: Which factors matter more in the “Best to test” sorting. The sum is normalized to 100%.
weights.total: Current sum: {{total}}% — normalized to 100% on save.
weights.atLeastOne: At least one weight must be greater than zero
weights.saved: Weights saved — hypotheses will be re-ranked

kpi_fit.label: Goal fit
kpi_fit.hint: how well the hypothesis hits the chosen goal

evidence.label: Evidence base
evidence.hint: how much supporting evidence was found in the documents

novelty.label: Novelty
novelty.hint: how fresh the idea is relative to the corpus

value.label: Value
value.hint: the expected impact if the hypothesis is confirmed

risk_inv.label: Risk manageability
risk_inv.hint: the lower the risk, the higher the contribution

runtime.title: Hypothesis factory parameters
runtime.hintBody: The values control the hypothesis board, quick queues, generation from goals, topics, and directions, and the directions derived from the knowledge graph.
runtime.description: Working thresholds and limits you can change without touching code.
runtime.queuesHint: Ready = the check confirms the hypothesis + TRL ≥ {{trl}} + score ≥ {{score}}%. Risk = the check refutes it, gives a mixed verdict, the card is closed, or risk ≥ {{risk}}%.
runtime.excludedPlaceholder: e.g. cobalt-bearing compositions; technologies above 200 MPa
runtime.excludedHint: The factory will not propose hypotheses in these directions — applies to all of the owner's generations.
runtime.deepHint: Before saving, adds peer review, a separate novelty assessment, and the sources' stance; disabled for a fast MVP.
runtime.serverLimit: Current server-side generation limit: 1–{{max}}. The board load limit stays system-defined so tab counters don't drift from the data.

defaultGenerateCount.label: Hypotheses per goal
defaultGenerateCount.hint: how many the “Generate” button on the Goals page creates

clusterGenerateCount.label: Hypotheses per topic
clusterGenerateCount.hint: how many the button on a topic page creates

directionGenerateCount.label: Hypotheses per direction
directionGenerateCount.hint: how many the button on a direction page creates

generationTimeoutSec.label: Generation timeout
generationTimeoutSec.hint: how long to wait for the model's reply before reporting an error

graphDirectionLimit.label: Directions from the graph
graphDirectionLimit.hint: how many suggestions the panel on the Goals page shows

readyTrlMin.label: Ready: minimum TRL
readyTrlMin.hint: the technology readiness level at which a hypothesis enters the “Ready” queue

readyScoreMin.label: Ready: minimum score
readyScoreMin.hint: the minimum overall score for the “Ready” queue

riskScoreMin.label: Risk: risk threshold
riskScoreMin.hint: the risk level at which a hypothesis enters the “Risk” queue

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.description: Two sides of the factory: LLM usage and the provider budget — and live pipeline latencies by stage.

usage.title: LLM budget and usage
usage.pendingDescription: LLM requests, tokens, and cost by operation — will appear once the factory starts computing.
usage.averagedOver_one: averaged over {{formatted}} hypothesis for the period
usage.averagedOver_other: averaged over {{formatted}} hypotheses for the period
usage.noQuota: no daily quota · provider limits concurrency

trace.title: Latency and stages — where time is spent
trace.description: Each stage's latency (p50 / p95) from Prometheus over real traffic, in path order. The darkest bars are the bottlenecks.
trace.empty: No latency measurements yet. Stages will appear once documents and queries pass through the pipeline.
trace.ingestPath: Document path — from upload to index
trace.queryPath: Query path — from question to answer

jobs.title: Hypothesis jobs — total time
jobs.description: How long a job takes end to end, from start to result, over the last 24 hours. Confirms the “first batch of hypotheses in minutes” requirement.

workers.title: Background factory
workers.description: Background computation delays — from worker statuses; the interactive path — from Prometheus above.

system.title: Shared generation parameters
system.description: Apply to every user and are picked up within seconds.
system.modelHint: Model name at the provider; empty — as deployed.
system.apiKeySet: A key is set — type a new one to replace it
system.pubsearchEnabled: Search scientific publications while forming hypotheses
system.pubsearchEnabledHint: OpenAlex and Crossref pick articles for the “world practice” section. Turn off on an offline stand.
system.mailtoHint: With an email OpenAlex responds faster (polite pool); without it only Crossref is used.
system.genBreadthHint: More short ideas first; details are filled in on the second pass.
system.kpiSuggestHint: The “suggest goals” button on the generation page.
system.qualityFloorHint: 0–1: cards with a weaker structure are archived.
system.applyNote: Changes apply within ~5 seconds. An empty field restores the deployed value.
system.saved: Saved — applies within a few seconds
system.llmDesc: The provider and model that write answers and hypotheses. The key is stored server-side and never echoed back.

cost.title: Cost accounting
cost.desc: FX rate and price list for the LLM spend shown on the Metrics page.
cost.rubRateHint: For the unified ruble total: OpenRouter's real USD is converted to ₽.
cost.currencyHint: For providers without usage.cost (Yandex). OpenRouter is always in $.

system.urlHint: An OpenAI-compatible server: vLLM, llama.cpp, etc. Empty — as deployed.
system.apiKeyHint: Required for OpenRouter and Yandex; a local server usually needs none.
system.unsaved: Unsaved changes — they will apply to every user.
